title: Replace body_type string with BodyType enum in MessageCreateInput
description: MessageCreateInput.body_type is &str but the spec defines exactly two valid values: 'text/plain' and 'text/markdown'. An unrecognized value causes a server MethodError with no compile-time protection. Add a BodyType enum with Plain, Markdown, and Unknown(String) variants (consistent with ChatKind, ChatMemberRole etc in types::) and use it in MessageCreateInput and MessagePatch.
